languages.original_text: "And that is what unites us. A sincere answer — it is a rare ruler who will admit that {mf|he|she} fears anything at all."

languages.text: "И это нас объединяет. Искренний ответ, не каждый владыка готов признаться, что боится чего-либо".
"And that is what unites us. A sincere answer — it is a rare ruler who will admit that {mf|he|she} fears anything at all."
languages.original_text: "И это нас объединяет. Искренний ответ, не каждый владыка готов признаться, что боится чего-либо".

traits.locale_text: "And that is what unites us. A sincere answer — it is a rare ruler who will admit that {mf|he|she} fears anything at all."
"And that is what unites us. A sincere answer — it is a rare ruler who will admit that {mf|he|she} fears anything at all."
"And that is what unites us. A sincere answer — it is a rare ruler who will admit that {mf|he|she} fears anything at all."

languages.text: «Y eso es lo que nos une. Una respuesta sincera. Es raro que los gobernantes admitan sus miedos».
languages.original_text: "And that is what unites us. A sincere answer — it is a rare ruler who will admit that {mf|he|she} fears anything at all."

traits.locale_text: «Y eso es lo que nos une. Una respuesta sincera. Es raro que los gobernantes admitan sus miedos».

languages.text: “而这就是我们之间的共通点。一个真诚的回答——很少有统治者会承认自己害怕什么。”
languages.original_text: "And that is what unites us. A sincere answer — it is a rare ruler who will admit that {mf|he|she} fears anything at all."

traits.locale_text: “而这就是我们之间的共通点。一个真诚的回答——很少有统治者会承认自己害怕什么。”

languages.text: « Et c'est ce qui nous unit. Une réponse sincère... Il est rare d'entendre {mf|un dirigeant|une dirigeante} admettre qu'{mf|il|elle} connaît la peur. »
languages.original_text: "And that is what unites us. A sincere answer — it is a rare ruler who will admit that {mf|he|she} fears anything at all."

traits.locale_text: « Et c'est ce qui nous unit. Une réponse sincère... Il est rare d'entendre {mf|un dirigeant|une dirigeante} admettre qu'{mf|il|elle} connaît la peur. »

languages.text: "Und das verbindet uns. Eine ehrliche Antwort — nur selten gibt {mf|ein Herrscher|eine Herrscherin} zu, dass {mf|er|sie} überhaupt etwas fürchtet."
languages.original_text: "And that is what unites us. A sincere answer — it is a rare ruler who will admit that {mf|he|she} fears anything at all."

traits.locale_text: "Und das verbindet uns. Eine ehrliche Antwort — nur selten gibt {mf|ein Herrscher|eine Herrscherin} zu, dass {mf|er|sie} überhaupt etwas fürchtet."

languages.text: そして、それこそが私たちを結びつけるものなのです」。真摯な答え--何かを恐れていると認める支配者は稀だ。
languages.original_text: "And that is what unites us. A sincere answer — it is a rare ruler who will admit that {mf|he|she} fears anything at all."

languages.text: "Bizi birleştiren şey de bu. Samimi bir cevap. Bir şeyden korktuğunu itiraf edecek idareciler nadir bulunur."
languages.original_text: "And that is what unites us. A sincere answer — it is a rare ruler who will admit that {mf|he|she} fears anything at all."

traits.locale_text: "Bizi birleştiren şey de bu. Samimi bir cevap. Bir şeyden korktuğunu itiraf edecek idareciler nadir bulunur."
